quote: Stuff your eyes with wonder... live as if you'd drop dead in ten seconds. See the world. It's more fantastic than any dream made or paid for in factories. – Ray Bradbury
fact: A cat uses its whiskers to determine if a space is too small to squeeze through.
tip: Use keyboard shortcuts to save time.
joke: Which side of the chicken has more feathers? The outside.
